patches_applied.description: Added guard_tick_volume() helper in smc-superfib-sniper.php. Clamps negative tick_volume to 0 with audit event. Volume is display-only and safe to clamp.
patches_applied.change: insert_mt5_candle(): volume field now uses guard_tick_volume() instead of raw (int) cast. New private method guard_tick_volume() added.

patches_applied.description: Added Test 8 to test-ea-market-stream.php: negative tick_volume clamped to 0, candle still stored.

Ran npx prettier --write src/ scripts/ to auto-fix 77 pre-existing Prettier formatting errors. Zero logic changes. npm run lint now shows 0 errors (8 pre-existing react-hooks warnings remain — intentional, not fixable without logic changes).

test_results.all_php_regression_tests: ALL PASS (9 test files, 15 assertions in EA test)
